data.title: Francisco Partners acquires Jamf for $2.2 billion, at $13.05 per share in cash. CEO excited about milestone.
data.description: In Minneapolis, leading Apple at work management company, Jamf, has been officially acquired by Francisco Partners for $13.05 per share in cash. The acquisition totals around $2.2 billion in enterprise value. CEO of Jamf, John Strosahl, expressed enthusiasm for this development, highlighting it as a significant milestone for the company. Jamf's platform is well-regarded for assisting organizations in effectively managing and securing their Apple devices across various sizes of enterprises.

data.title: Stock futures drop as Trump nominates Kevin Warsh for new Fed Chair. PPI rose 0.5% in Dec, 3% in 2025. Indexes down: Dow -0.84%, S&P -0.92%, Nasdaq -1.13%. SanDisk (+20.53%) up.
data.description: US stock futures dropped on Friday after a mixed close on Thursday, with major benchmark indices lower. President Trump nominated Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Chair of the Federal Reserve. The Producer Price Index rose by 0.5% in December after a delay caused by a government shutdown, ending the year with a 3.0% increase for 2025. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.26% and the two-year bond was at 3.56%. The FedWatch tool projected an 84.7% likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in March. Index Performance: Dow Jones -0.84%, S&P 500 -0.92%, Nasdaq 100 -1.13%, Russell 2000 -1.51%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was down 0.32% at $691.84, and the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF declined 0.46% to $626.52. Apple stock was 0.34% lower despite strong financial results for Q1 of fiscal 2026. SanDisk Corp surged 20.53% after posting positive results.

However, their practical application is hindered by the atmospheric instability of organic semiconductors. This instability ultimately results in decreased...

data.title: StorageVault to repay 5.75% hybrid debentures due Jan 31, 2026.
data.description: StorageVault Corporation has confirmed the repayment at maturity of its 5.75% Senior Unsecured Hybrid Debentures, which were due on January 31, 2026. This repayment marks the conclusion of the debentures' term and stands as a significant financial milestone for the company. These debentures represented a key aspect of StorageVault's financial structure, totaling a substantial amount. The successful repayment of these debentures reflects the company's stable financial position and its commitment to fulfilling its financial obligations in a timely manner.

data.title: GDS Holdings has secured a US$300 million private placement with a Chinese investor, for data center expansion.
data.description: In Shanghai, China, on January 30, 2026, GDS Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: GDS; HKEX: 9698), a prominent developer and operator of high-performance data centers in China, revealed a private placement deal totaling US$300 million of Series B convertible preferred shares to Huatai Capital Investment Limited, a Chinese institutional investor. The investment, known as the Private Placement, is intended to aid in the expansion of GDS's data center capacity and for general corporate objectives.

data.title: MetroCity Bankshares Q4 earnings report: EPS of $0.68 missed estimate by -7.000%, revenue up $8.36 million year-on-year.
data.description: MetroCity Bankshares (NASDAQ: MCBS) released its Q4 earnings report on January 30, 2026, at 09:00 AM. The report shows that the company fell short of estimated earnings by -7.000000000000001%, with an EPS of $0.68 compared to an estimated $0.73. Revenue increased by $8.36 million from the previous year. In the previous earnings period, the company also missed on EPS. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.description: Imperial Oil (AMEX: IMO) unveiled its Q4 financial results on January 30, 2026, at 07:55 AM. Key highlights include exceeding estimated earnings by 1.0%, showcasing an EPS of $1.41 compared to the expected $1.39. Revenue witnessed a decrease of $924.00 million year-over-year. data.title: AAPL releases handbook for transitioning physicians, "Managing the Maze," addressing post-training career challenges.
data.description: A new book titled Managing the Maze: A Handbook for Residents and Fellowship Physicians Navigating Decision Points Post-Training has been released by the American Association for Physician Leadership (AAPL) on January 30, 2026. The handbook, authored by Edward R..., offers guidance to newly trained physicians as they navigate important career decisions.

data.title: Tiger Group opens bids for truck and tractor liquidation sale closing on Feb. 3, featuring various assets including Peterbilt, Kenworth, and more.
data.description: A recent online auction in Birmingham, Alabama on January 30, 2026, organized by Tiger Group, showcased a variety of assets previously owned by Montgomery Transport. The auction included trucks and flatbed trailers from popular brands such as Peterbilt, Kenworth, Chevy, Reitnouer, and Fontaine. This marked the beginning of a series of liquidation sales ordered by a receiver, with a significant number of assets up for bidding.

data.title: Core Natural Resources, Inc. (NYSE: CNR) to reveal Q4 2025 results on Feb 12th in an investor call at 10 a.m. ET.
data.description: A company based in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania, Core Natural Resources, Inc. (NYSE: CNR) is set to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025. The discussion will take place during an investor conference call scheduled for Thursday, February 12, 2026, starting at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time. Shareholders and interested individuals can join the call to gain insights into the company's latest financial figures.

data.title: Allspring closed-end funds declare monthly distributions for EAD, ERC, and ERH. Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on January 30, 2026, three funds - the Allspring Income Opportunities Fund (NYSE American: EAD), the Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund (NYSE American: ERC), and the Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund (NYSE American: ERH) - have recently declared distributions. These funds are listed under the tickers EAD, ERC, and ERH on the NYSE American exchange.

data.title: OceanPal Inc. (NASDAQ: SVRN) appoints CBIZ CPAs P.C. as new independent registered public accounting firm.
data.description: Athens, Greece - On January 30, 2026, OceanPal Inc. revealed that CBIZ CPAs P.C. has been appointed as the Company's independent registered public accounting firm without delay. Known as OP, the Company is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol SVRN. The decision was made by the Board of Directors.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig wins case for Dale Swanberg as SEC drops civil securities fraud charges on Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: In Miami and Minneapolis on January 30, 2026, Greenberg Traurig lawyers, headed by Global Litigation Practice Co-Chair William Michael, Jr., achieved success for Dale Swanberg as the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) dropped its civil securities fraud case.

data.title: XTI Aerospace partners with Freefly Systems FLUX Series to provide LiDAR options for enterprise mapping, aiding inspection. Nasdaq: XTIA.
data.description: Drone Nerds, based in Englewood, Colorado, has incorporated professional LiDAR payload options to facilitate enterprise mapping and inspection tasks. This move comes as XTI Aerospace, Inc. (XTIA) expands its offerings, targeting the Nasdaq market. XTI Aerospace, a prominent aerospace technology firm, is dedicated to designing advanced solutions for various industries. This strategic shift underscores the increasing demand for LiDAR technology in the mapping and inspection sectors, enhancing efficiency and precision.

data.title: Johnson Controls named to Fortune World's Most Admired Companies 2026 list, reflecting global team dedication.
data.description: Johnson Controls, a global leader in smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, has recently been included in Fortune's 2026 list of the World's Most Admired Companies. This recognition showcases the commitment of their worldwide team. Johnson Controls, traded on the NYSE under JCI, continues to make strides in the industry. This acknowledgment is a testament to their success and influence.

data.title: K-beauty brand COSRX sponsors hair for MISS SOHEE at Paris Fashion Week, expanding presence in haute couture stage.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Paris Fashion Week Haute Couture Spring/Summer 2026, COSRX, a prominent K-beauty brand, reinforced its position as a global leader by serving as the official backstage hair sponsor for MISS SOHEE. The backstage hair management during the event was supervised by COSRX, showcasing its influence in the fashion world.
